    Drop Shadow

    Renders a soft shadow outside a label, image, or vector graphic. Adjust the offset, blur radius, and color to create elevation, directional lighting, or multiple layered shadows.

    Parameters

    Parameter Description
    offset-x Horizontal offset of the shadow
    offset-y Vertical offset of the shadow
    blur-radius Softness and spread of the shadow
    color Color and opacity of the shadow
    In this article
